parents.subject: EX-3687 osp: do force disconnect if import is not ready

commit.subject: LU-14920 llite: Reverts
commit.message:
LU-14920 llite: Reverts

This is a test of reverting the parallel dio patches,
specifically:
0001-LU-14805-llite-No-locked-parallel-DIO.patch
0001-LU-14828-tests-Remove-extra-debug.patch
0001-LU-13798-llite-parallelize-direct-i-o-issuance.patch

This is a quick and dirty revert to base other patches on
for testing, not intended to land.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I9f74e445885dd64c51a70a515ee8bfc2577c2831
